title: Work from Home & Hybrid Workspace Policy
description: Guidelines on operating hours, network security, home internet allowances, and weekly hybrid desk schedules.

title: Information Security & Clean Desk Policy
description: Rules regarding daily locking of workstations, multi-factor authentication, strong passphrases, and secure disposal of paper documents.

title: Code of Conduct & Anti-Harassment Guidelines
description: Commitment to safe, respect-driven workspaces free from any verbal, physical, or psychological harassment, and compliance reporting lines.
